docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIAUBA, KAROLIS SERVED FEB-28-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YERAHIAN, CLAUDIO
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $25.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIAUBA, KAROLIS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YERAHIAN, CLAUDIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION OF PREMISES RESTORED TO PLTF. ON 4/30/02. $500,000.00 RENT, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500,104.00, TOTAL AMOUNT OF JUDGMENT - $5104, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

ORDER --PER COMM. BEST--DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, FILED; THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED; THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
